title: Magnetic Stirrer 5.9 inch Magnetic Stir Plate with stir bar LCD Display 100-1600RPM Max Stirring Capacity 5000ml Digital Magnetic Stir Plate Magnetic Mixer Lab Stirrers(No Heating)
description:
【HIGH QUALITY】Working Plate：5.9×5.9 inch. The Max stirring volume of magnetic stirrer is 5L which is mainly used for stirring low-viscosity liquids and solid-liquid mixtures.The LCD liquid crystal display allows you to see the speed and time parameters at a glance.【Note】Please remove the film from the LCD display before use
【ADJUSTABLE SPEED&TIMING】The magnetic mixer can set the timing of 1-99h59min. The stirring speed can be adjusted between 100 and 1600RPM according to actual needs. Provide a more comfortable working environment with less noise
【MULTI-FUNCTION】Magnetic stirrer mixer is equipped with forward and reverse rotation function, which can stop in the middle of running, and start slowly. With program control mode, lab stirrer can be set up to 6 groups of running programs to meet different experimental needs. Then the stirrer mixer also has a memory function, which can memorize the last set working parameters
【WIDE APPLICATION】Magnetic stirrers are suitable for stirring and mixing in scientific experimental research,industry,agriculture,home yeast fermentation,etc. However,it cannot be used for stirring high-viscosity liquids such as epoxy resin and liquid agar
【PRECAUTIONS & SERVICES】Keep the digital magnetic stirrer away from objects and equipment that are magnetic or can generate magnetic fields. If there is any problem with the product, please contact us, we will give you satisfactory service.【Note】Please remove the film from the LCD display before use
reviews_5s:
Model with readouts / no heat..... I found the controls very responsive and easily set. The three touch sensitive buttons (Program...Spin Direction...Start Stop) worked flawlessly even with the front panel escushion problem that began after a few day's use. These touch controls have an LED within a small spring. I think the spring being metal is what the touch control circuit uses to sense a finger's touch. The front panel is held in place with a bead of pressure adhesive. I have ordered/returned 2 of these mixers because the front panel escushion begins to lift up. It appears that the three springs used for the touch control are strong enough to begin to push up the front panel escushion. I have used some painter's tape to hold down the front edge and after a couple hours, it can be removed and the adhesive does hold down the panel. But after a few hours, the adhesive fails. I truely liked this stirrer, but without leaving the tape on, that panel pops up nearly 1/8". Yes, the touch controls work, but you end up pushing down the front panel escushion which only pops up again in a few minutes. I pondered just taping it down, but considering how attractive it looks without that tape, I regretfully sent it back. This mixer would be FIVE STAR if only that panel's adhesive kept it in place.
July 19, 2024 Update... After submitting this review without me doing anything, the manufacturer over in China sent me an email regarding the problem with the front panel. They offered me a replacement unit that would be sent directly from their facilities in China. So I sad OK ... I got it and so far no problem with that panel lifting. Please take note of this as I do like all the features of this mixer and the seller went to all the expense to mail a brand new one to me. That says something great about their customer service.I've been meaning to get one of these for my yeast starters. Finally pulled the trigger on this one. Works well.This magnetic stirrer makes it is so much easier to heat up a liquid to the right temperature without overheating and boiling it!This has been the best hot plate I've bought to date, I own 4 other plates and none of them compare to this one. Thank you for the value plus performance.Nice it's just the right sizeVery good quality itemThis is exactly what I've been looking for, and it's worked perfectly for the amount of time I've been using it regularly. It's a bit overkill for my application, but when has having more than you need ever been a problem?I’ve been using this magnetic stirrer to make our DIY moisturizers and cleansing gels, and it has been a great addition to the process. The 5.9-inch stir plate provides plenty of room to accommodate larger containers, and the 5000ml capacity works well for the batches I usually make.

The speed range is adjustable, and I found the 200-1600RPM range to be more than enough for mixing thick gels and emulsifying ingredients. The stir bar included is sturdy and does a good job staying in place without wobbling, even at higher speeds. There’s no heating element, which is fine for me since my projects don’t require it.

It runs quietly, which is a nice touch when I’m working for extended periods. The build feels sturdy for home use, and the controls are straightforward—no unnecessary bells and whistles, just a solid tool that does the job.We are sweet tea snobs. There is said it. We all get one big glass each a day and we want it to be as good as it gets. So when the tea bags go in the picture, the picture goes on the plate to be gently stirred until it's ready. I can easily place and stir a gallon sized tea picture on this plate and as we generally make a gallon every other day or so it has a place of prominence on our kitchen counter next to our electric kettle. We just drop the stirring magnet in and when it's done we use another magnet to catch it and bring it out for cleaning. Crazy i know but we're southern and that's how we roll around here, with our crazy out in the yard and sweet tea you can stand on in the fridge. The only complaint i have about this plate is the power cord. It's a little finicky where it attaches to the plate. It's a little loose to be honest and if moved just right will make you think it is broken. I should deduct a star for that but as it's brought our sweet tea production into a whole nother level I can't complain too much.Works great for what I needed. Used this for a craft by putting it inside a holo book and using it to stir a potion on top with sparkly mica powder in it.
reviews_1s:
Super frustrating I didn’t open this till like a month ago. I’ve used it a couple times which obviously has passed the send back date and now the thing just stays on and continues to stir, and the face plate doesn’t work. It’s never been wet. Waste of money.First mixer returned due to the temp control not holding temp. Review of second mixer below.

Second unit worse than the first. It came with a threaded temp sensor that is shorter than the first and not what is pictured. Not sure this is the correct sensor for this mixer. The display was smugged and scratched . Also the stand holder in the unit was stripped.

I asked the seller if these are refurbished units and they said no but I'm not convinced. Looks like a nice mixer if you can get one that works. I sent it back again and will try a different brand. Hard to trust it when you've had two bad ones in a row.

Maybe the company will get there act together and start selling a quality mixer. They are not much help also so if you try one just go ahead and send it back if you get a bad one. That will save you a few days waiting. Or just buy a different mixer to start with.Will accomplish 1/3 output performance of what is advertised.
Tried contacting manufacturer, no response yet
With Amazon you have to return unit and wait up to 30 days for refund or wait until they get return and then order a replacement,There is no information regarding the voltage.
The manufacturer state 100-240V but once the item arrive it says 110V on the unit.One will read 21 degrees c and when I actually measure it, it’s almost 82 c and I got a second one and when I set it to 80c I could press my hand to it. Don’t buy this
